sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Divine Apex
feat.text: You can pour divine power into an item, letting the wearer exceed their limits. When you complete your daily preparations, you can touch one worn magical item that doesn’t have the apex trait. It gains the apex trait until your next preparations (GM Core 270), and you choose one of your deity’s divine attributes (page 35). The item increases that attribute modifier by 1 or to +4, whichever is higher. A character can benefit from only one apex item at a time, as normal.

traits.name: Cleric
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the cleric class.

archetype.name: Mortal Herald
archetype.note: This archetype offers Divine Apex at a different level than displayed here.
